/usr/bin/ar qc libAtlasEditor.a CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/src/AtlasEditor_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/EditorShell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Core/EditorModeController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Input/EditorInputRouter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Camera/EditorCameraController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Selection/SelectionSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Outliner/SceneOutliner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Inspector/PropertyInspector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Gizmos/GizmoSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Commands/CommandStack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Commands/TransformCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Commands/PropertyEditCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Commands/VoxelEditCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Validation/ValidationSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Voxel/VoxelChunkEditor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Voxel/VoxelEditorMode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/PCG/PCGDebugSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Outliner/SceneHierarchySystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Gizmos/PlacementSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Prefabs/PrefabLibrary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Prefabs/PrefabManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Core/EditorDockLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/AI/DiffReviewPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Docs/DesignDocPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Docs/FeatureChecklistPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEditor.dir/Docs/ADLPanel.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libAtlasEditor.a
